name: Butterscotch Tapioca
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring the water and salt to a boil in a large, deep saucepan.
2. Sprinkle in tapioca pearls.
3. Add the dark brown sugar, lower the heat slightly, and cook for 5 minutes or until the tapioca is clear.
4. In a small bowl, beat the eggs.
5. Add the milk and granulated sugar to the beaten eggs and blend well.
6. Stir 1 cup of the hot tapioca mixture into the egg-milk mixture, then combine it with the rest of the tapioca.
7. Continue cooking over low heat, stirring often, for about 10 minutes or until the mixture bubbles up.
8. In a small saucepan, melt the butter over medium heat until it is light brown.
9. Add the melted butter to the bubbling pudding, along with the vanilla, and mix well.
10. Pour the pudding into a 3-quart serving bowl and allow it to cool to room temperature.
11. This pudding will set up without refrigeration (about 6 hours) and is best eaten immediately. If refrigerated, let the pudding come to room temperature before serving and stir gently to further soften it. Note: Tapioca pearls do not need to be soaked before cooking.
